schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Vaya Vandana Yojana (PMVVY)
schemes.benefit: Guaranteed 7.4% pension for 10 years on lump-sum deposit up to Rs 15 lakh
schemes.benefit_hi: ₹15 लाख तक की जमा पर 10 साल तक 7.4% गारंटीड पेंशन

schemes.name: Senior Citizens' Savings Scheme (SCSS)
schemes.benefit: 8.2% interest per quarter, up to Rs 30 lakh deposit, 5-year tenure
schemes.eligibility: Citizens aged 60+ (55+ for VRS; 50+ for retired defence)

schemes.name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension (IGNOAPS)
schemes.benefit: Rs 200-500/month pension for BPL elderly above 60 years
schemes.eligibility: BPL persons aged 60+ not receiving other government pension

schemes.name: Integrated Programme for Senior Citizens (IPSrC)
schemes.benefit: Old age homes, day care centres, mobile medicare units for destitute elderly
schemes.benefit_hi: निराश्रित वृद्धों के लिए वृद्धाश्रम, डे केयर, मोबाइल चिकित्सा
schemes.eligibility: Destitute/poor senior citizens with no family support

schemes.name: ECHS (Ex-Servicemen) / CGHS for Retired Govt Employees
schemes.benefit: Cashless medical care at empanelled hospitals for retired government/defence employees
schemes.benefit_hi: सेवानिवृत्त सरकारी/रक्षा कर्मियों को कैशलेस चिकित्सा
schemes.eligibility: Retired central government employees (CGHS) or ex-servicemen (ECHS)

schemes.name: Senior Citizen Health Insurance Tax Deduction (80D)
schemes.benefit: Rs 50,000 tax deduction on health insurance premium for senior citizens (vs Rs 25,000 for others)
schemes.benefit_hi: वरिष्ठ नागरिकों के स्वास्थ्य बीमा प्रीमियम पर ₹50,000 कर कटौती
schemes.eligibility: Senior citizens aged 60+ paying health insurance premiums

schemes.name: Elder Line (National Helpline for Senior Citizens 14567)
schemes.benefit: Free helpline for information, emotional support, legal aid, crisis response for seniors
schemes.benefit_hi: वरिष्ठ नागरिकों के लिए मुफ्त जानकारी, भावनात्मक सहायता, कानूनी मदद
schemes.eligibility: All senior citizens aged 60+ across India

schemes.name: Maintenance and Welfare of Parents and Senior Citizens Act
schemes.benefit: Legal right to claim maintenance from children/relatives; Maintenance Tribunal for quick resolution
schemes.benefit_hi: बच्चों/रिश्तेदारों से भरण-पोषण का कानूनी अधिकार
schemes.eligibility: Senior citizens not maintained by their children

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Vaya Mitra Scheme (Proposed)
schemes.benefit: Home care workers trained by government for elderly at nominal cost
schemes.benefit_hi: वृद्धों की घरेलू देखभाल के लिए सरकार प्रशिक्षित केयरवर्कर
schemes.eligibility: Senior citizens aged 70+ needing daily assistance

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana (Retirement Phase)
schemes.benefit: Guaranteed pension Rs 1,000-5,000/month from age 60 for life + spouse
schemes.benefit_hi: 60 वर्ष बाद आजीवन ₹1,000-5,000/माह पेंशन + जीवनसाथी को भी

schemes.name: Income Tax Exemption for Senior Citizens (Section 87A + SCSS)
schemes.benefit: No tax up to Rs 5 lakh income; no estimated advance tax payment needed for seniors 75+
schemes.benefit_hi: ₹5 लाख आय तक कोई टैक्स नहीं; 75+ को एडवांस टैक्स से छूट
schemes.eligibility: Senior citizens (60-80: Rs 3L exemption; 80+: Rs 5L exemption)

schemes.name: SAGE (Seniorcare Ageing Growth Engine)
schemes.benefit: Marketplace listing + government certification for senior-care startups and products
schemes.benefit_hi: वरिष्ठ देखभाल स्टार्टअप के लिए सरकारी प्रमाणन + मार्केटप्लेस
